narrative:
Findlay City Sd city school district has 26,001 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -9.6% D−R vs -36.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
